labels.notes: Ann Davidson 11:42 (15:42-16:34 UTC, 52 min, 6430 words) — INAPPROPRIATELY COMBINED with the next patient (toe-cyst drainage). Ann's primary issues were left shoulder rotator-cuff tendonitis and chronic sinus congestion; the right-foot ganglion cyst content in the SOAP belongs to the next patient who was put in the same room after Ann left. Multi-patient retrospective check did NOT trigger — same root as Marlene's case. Diagnostic code 726 (fibromyalgia) is wrong sub-pick — Ann had rotator-cuff tendonitis (likely 727 disorders of synovium/tendon/bursa) plus sinus (473). Failure modes: cross-patient-contamination, multi-patient-retrospective-check-not-triggered, dx-fibromyalgia-mis-grouping.
